name: QuestionnaireAnswerConstraint
title: Questionnaire answer constraint codes
description: Codes that describe the types of constraints possible on a question item that has a list of permitted answers [Note: This is a clone of QuestionnaireAnswerConstraint codesystem from R5 (adopting R5 capability)]

concept.definition: Only values listed as answerOption or in the expansion of the answerValueSet are permitted
In addition to the values listed as answerOption or in the expansion of the answerValueSet, any other values that correspond to the specified item.type are permitted
In addition to the values listed as answerOption or in the expansion of the answerValueSet, free-text strings are permitted.  Answers will have a type of 'string'.
